Strategic Transformations | UNMASK Engine · Structural Recalibration

Nikki Cates

Structural Recalibration Strategist

"This is the problem we never had language for."

Nikki Cates diagnoses and repairs the organizational architectures that produce burnout, leadership collapse, and decision paralysis. With over a decade in operational leadership, she pioneered the UNMASK Leadership Architecture to fix the structural design flaws that traditional HR surveys ignore.

Her work sits at the intersection of talent sustainability and AI acceleration, bringing a diagnostician's precision and a practitioner's credibility to every stage. She has delivered the UNMASK framework across nonprofit, corporate, and mission-driven environments, consistently producing the same recognition in leadership teams.

Army Veteran10+ Years Operational LeadershipUNMASK Framework CreatorAI-Era Organizational StrategistWomanist TheologianPublished Author
★★★★★ 5.0 · Google Reviews

nikki@strategicunmasking.com

nikkicates.github.io

What Audiences Say

"Her message was raw, real, and unforgettable. With every word, she peeled back the emotional layers we so often hide behind. Nikki reminded us that healing starts when we get honest about the parts we cover up."

Emmanuel Simms Healing Cosplay Theory

"She captivated the audience from the moment she stepped on stage and delivered powerful, practical insights. Her authenticity, energy, and ability to connect made a lasting impact on every woman in the room. I would absolutely recommend her for any speaking engagement."

Jeunyde Josuin Purple Butterflies Foundation
Signature Talks

Five Talks. One Through Line.

Every talk moves organizations from symptom management to structural diagnosis. All talks available as 30–90 min keynotes, workshop formats, or panel presentations.

Anchor Keynote

"Stop the Strain Transfer: Why Your Best Leaders Are Burning Out"

Reframes burnout as a structural engineering failure, not a personal one. Moves organizations from wellness management to structural architecture.

Audience leaves with: A diagnostic framework and a mandate for structural change at the source.
Executive Summit

"Your Leadership Pipeline Is Leaking"

Identifies the authority gap costing organizations 213% in replacement costs and shows exactly where the structural breaks are hiding.

Audience leaves with: A shared leadership language and a clear intervention priority.
Operations

"False Urgency: How "Everything Is Critical" Is Destroying Your Organization"

Dismantles the hidden architecture of overwork and decision chaos. Redesigns cadence so urgency is no longer a management style.

Audience leaves with: A concrete framework for separating real urgency from structural noise.
Women's Leadership

"Sovereign Power: Leading Without Running on Empty"

For leaders who have mastered the role and are quietly depleted by it. Aligns authentic capacity with institutional demand for durable performance.

Audience leaves with: Tools to align authentic capacity with institutional demand without self-extraction.
AI-Era Track

"When AI Breaks the Bridge: Protecting Human Architecture in the Age of Automation"

Why deploying AI onto misaligned human architecture accelerates collapse — and the decision-rights protocols that prevent it.

Audience leaves with: A structural risk map for AI deployment and a prioritized intervention list.
Watch Nikki in Action

Speaker Reel & Featured Talks

See the diagnostic precision, the room presence, and the clarity that moves leadership teams to action.

View Full YouTube Channel

YouTube: youtube.com/@iamnikkicates

URI Formation · Faith, Justice & Community Audiences

Liberation & Leadership Formation

These offerings draw from the UNMASK framework, adapted for faith-based, justice-centered, and formation-focused communities. Nikki is a Liberation & Leadership Formation Strategist operating at the intersection of Womanist theology, structural analysis, and identity work.

Tier 1 · Keynote

"Unmasking, Identity & Self-Stewardship in Systems That Demand Performance"

Reframes burnout as structural and spiritual. Introduces the self-stewardship pathway for leaders in service-based and justice-centered roles.

Format: 60–90 min · In-person or virtual
Tier 2 · Intensive

"Liberation & Healing Intensive"

Deep formation experience integrating identity work, boundary restoration, and the Super Employee Mask. Includes SU frameworks, Seasons 1 & 2.

Format: Half-day / Full-day / Multi-day
Tier 3 · Series

"Liberation & Leadership Formation Series"

Sustained transformation across 3–6 sessions. Womanist theology integration, community processing, leadership application, and implementation.

Format: 3–6 sessions · Cohort format
Tier 4 · Advisory

"Liberation & Leadership Advisory Partnership"

Institutional transformation through 3–6 month embedded partnership. Monthly advisory sessions, curriculum guidance, and community health check-ins.

Format: 3–6 month engagement
"Limited engagements are reserved each year for smaller organizations and community-based initiatives. Please inquire for availability."
Submit URI Formation Inquiry →
Engagement Pricing

2026 Rate Card

Speaking & Keynotes Starting at $12,500
Workshops & Intensives Starting at $15,000
Consulting Engagements Starting at $18,000
URI Formation Engagements Starting at $12,500
Custom Enterprise Scope Contact for proposal
Full engagement pricing and booking terms available upon request.
Booking & Travel Requirements

Logistics

Deposit 50% of total fee at contract signing to secure the date.
Balance Remaining balance due 7 days prior to engagement.
Air Travel Comfort Plus or Business Class. No economy. Billed at cost.
Hotel 4-star or above. One night pre-event + one night post-event. Billed at cost.
Ground Transport Executive car service on all event days. Billed at cost.
Meal Per Diem $100 per travel day. Itemized receipts provided.
Virtual 10% reduction on base fee. No travel costs apply.
Cancellation Deposit non-refundable within 30 days. Full fee retained within 14 days.
Contract Signed agreement required for all engagements.

Nikki Cates
